vpclattice.listener.defaultaction.CfnAbo: The action for the default rule. Each listener has a default rule. The default rule is used if no other rules match.

vpclattice.listener.defaultaction.FixedR.Description: Describes an action that returns a custom HTTP response.

vpclattice.listener.defaultaction.Forwar.Description: Describes a forward action. You can use forward actions to route requests to one or more target groups.
